name: Cape Cod Cranberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Cut in the butter using pastry blender or two knives until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in cranberries, orange peel, and sugar; stir in buttermilk just until ingredients are moistened.
4. Working on a floured surface, shape dough into two 8-inch circles, about 1/2-inch thick.
5. Cut each circle into eight wedges and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
